style_constraints: low saturation, worn materials, restrained magic
no xianxia glamour, no neon, no modern objects
preserve character and prop continuity over isolated beauty

prompts.prompt: Black vertical screen, cold white title text area reserved for '帝国历1226年', minimal cinematic texture, distant war drum mood, restrained historical fantasy opening.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No decorative particles, no map animation, no colorful glow.

prompts.prompt: Low angle partial northern battlefield in snow, iron hooves crushing snow, wounded human border soldiers seen from behind, black border wall shadow, beast flag and white-wing black-sun flag crossing in firelight, vertical frame.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No full army panorama, no named faces, no heroic clean armor, no modern weapons.

prompts.prompt: Close-up montage of wartime grain levy: insect official hand slams a wooden grain tax plaque on a poor door, half sack of grain dragged away, child's empty bowl with only water, dirty human village textures, vertical frame.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No clear faces, no festive market colors, no wealth, no modern printed text.

prompts.prompt: Southern dim room tabletop, hands hide an old relay map under medicine packets, broken Sun-Moon mark near a tiny ember covered by palm, match cut visual path into a thin Qingming incense thread in a village incense cup.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No full faces, no bright spell burst, no pristine imperial map.

prompts.prompt: Shen Weisang, 17-year-old lean village hunter in gray-brown worn clothing with bow and old leather wrist guard, standing behind villagers at Canyang Ao gate, eyes checking wind then muddy footprints, sunset pressure, vertical medium close-up.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No heroic armor, no noble styling, no mature general look.

prompts.prompt: Ground-level macro shot, thin cold-white Qingming incense thread crawling along dirt ground past straw sandals, hunter boots, and a village threshold, sunset dust, restrained eerie motion.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No thick fog, no colorful smoke, no explosion, no floating cloud.

prompts.prompt: Extreme close-up of a trembling child's wrist pinned on white cloth, a thin translucent insect-wax needle with black point piercing skin, clinical clean horror, vertical frame.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No gore splash, no large spike, no torture dungeon style.

prompts.prompt: Close-up of blood line crawling from wrist along white cloth into a spotless Qingming white register, page turning by itself, empty page reserved for readable text '旧污疑似', cold white and black ink.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No unreadable text, no colorful magic, no ornate spellbook.

prompts.prompt: Bai Yi in spotless white official robe and pale mask calmly wipes insect-wax needle with white cloth, child's mother stopped by crossed spears, sunset village gate sealed by insect inspectors, Shen Zhaomian hiding behind Luo Qinghe, vertical reveal.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No shouting villain, no full monster crowd, no clean fantasy village.

prompts.prompt: Shen Weisang pushed to inspection cloth, insect-wax needle hovering over his wrist, villagers as shoulder silhouettes around him, cold bureaucratic pressure, vertical medium close-up.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No aggressive fighting stance, no heroic glow, no full wings.

prompts.prompt: Luo Qinghe village medic gives a tiny warning glance toward Shen Weisang's left shoulder, Shen holds wrist still and controls breath, tight eyeline match, sunset village inspection.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No overt panic, no mystical priestess styling.

prompts.prompt: Qingming register close-up with short blood line stopped by thin incense smoke, page area reserved for readable text '山籍猎户', Bai Yi's dark compound-eye pattern softly in focus beyond ledger.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No unreadable text, no ornate magic flare.

prompts.prompt: Shen Weisang quietly puts the small herb pouch back into Shen Zhaomian's hands and moves her half a step behind him, Luo Qinghe's herb basket spills a little indigo powder, village gate pressure.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No melodramatic hug, no smiling, no clean heroic pose.

prompts.prompt: Canyang Ao medicine house interior, tall old medicine cabinet dominating vertical frame, Luo Qinghe stands protectively before cabinet, Bai Yi enters in spotless white robe, dim wood and sunset side light.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No luxurious pharmacy, no bright warm comfort, no visible relay carving.

prompts.prompt: Compressed close shot of Luo Qinghe opening a medicine drawer while Bai Yi watches her hands, old drawer labels for herbs, cold white robe against dark cabinet, tense quiet dialogue.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No exaggerated facial emotion, no fantasy spell effects.

prompts.prompt: Close-up of Luo Qinghe's fingers pausing at an old wooden cabinet edge, herb basket lowered to cover her hand, camera angle hides whatever she covers, tense medicine house shadows.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: Do not show relay mark, no glowing carving, no explanatory insert.

prompts.prompt: Shen Weisang at medicine house doorway follows a chain of clues: sister's herb pouch, mother's hand on basket, empty water jar, Luo Qinghe tapping jar rim twice, intimate hand close-ups.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No spoken exposition, no over-obvious glowing clue.

prompts.prompt: Bai Yi stops almost motionless as thin Qingming incense line curls back through medicine house doorway, white register inside sleeve subtly flips, cold side light, controlled menace.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No thick smoke, no jump scare, no angry expression.

prompts.prompt: Shen Zhaomian as a village child crouches at medicine house threshold, arranging herb name tiles from her small pouch, nervous hands, soft frightened eyes, vertical intimate close-up.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No adult features, no Qingming white robe yet, no villain look.

prompts.prompt: Luo Qinghe suddenly covers Shen Zhaomian's mouth, medicine house freezes, Bai Yi slowly turns back in spotless white, doorway split composition, quiet dread.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No screaming, no violent grab, no horror jump lighting.

prompts.prompt: Shen Weisang blocks his little sister with his body, Bai Yi's gaze drops to herb pouch, Qingming register corner marked with small readable note '识句', cold bureaucratic close-up.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No big fight pose, no unreadable mark, no magical burst.

prompts.prompt: Tight reaction sequence: Shen Zhaomian red-eyed, Luo Qinghe's face finally changes, Shen Weisang's hand tense as he pulls sister behind him, Bai Yi still calm.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No melodramatic crying, no angry villain, no physical attack.

prompts.prompt: Canyang Ao backyard spatial reference, medicine house doorway in background, wall-side water vat, old narrow well beside it, Shen Weisang entering with empty water jar, blue-gray dusk.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No separate isolated well location, no bright daylight.

prompts.prompt: Shen Weisang approaches water vat first and deliberately avoids touching the black worn well rope, old well beside him, tense dusk stillness.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No drawing water from the well, no heroic knife pose.

prompts.prompt: Top-down close-up of old well rim, gray dust crossed by a fresh wipe mark, thin Qingming incense thread creeping from wall root toward the rim, no view into the well.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No visible person inside well, no glowing jade object, no thick fog.

prompts.prompt: Over Shen Weisang's shoulder from old well side toward medicine house door, spear shadows push Shen Zhaomian inward, Luo Qinghe beside Bai Yi silently forbids Shen to shout, clear courtyard geography.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No confusing location jump, no direct rescue action.

prompts.prompt: Low close-up at well rim, Shen Weisang loosens his hand from short knife, presses wet mud over the crawling Qingming incense line with boot tip, a tiny moon-white glint reflects from oil-paper edge in wet moss.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No full moon jade shard, no hand from well, no face inside well, no strong magic glow.

prompts.prompt: Medicine house floor-level shot, insect inspector hands pry up old wooden floorboards in front of medicine cabinet, dust and wood splinters, tense low-cost practical action.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No explosive destruction, no modern tools.

prompts.prompt: Macro close-up of hidden compartment edge, broken Sun-Moon mark and old relay direction carving visible for first time, pale insect-wax seal crawling along the carved lines.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No pristine imperial emblem, no colorful magic, do not obscure carvings.

prompts.prompt: Bai Yi crouches and touches old carving through a clean white cloth, Luo Qinghe stands still without defense, dirty old wood and spotless white robe in sharp contrast.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No anger, no shouting, no warm heroic lighting.

prompts.prompt: Shen Zhaomian is pushed back by spear shadow against doorframe, small herb pouch drops to the ground, Shen Weisang reaches doorway and his hand touches short knife, tense split composition.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No actual stabbing, no big fight, no adult expression for child.

prompts.prompt: Luo Qinghe's eyes flick toward the backyard old well, Shen Weisang swallows, hides short knife back under sleeve, bends to pick up his sister's herb pouch, quiet visible restraint.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No spoken exposition, no heroic attack, no reveal of well person.

prompts.prompt: Villagers forced outside medicine house, thin Qingming incense crosses the threshold, Bai Yi stands on step and closes the spotless white register, cold official pressure at dusk.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No triumphant villain pose, no large clear crowd faces.

prompts.prompt: Spears drop to seal the line between medicine house and backyard, Shen Weisang shields Shen Zhaomian behind him and looks past spear gap toward the old well, clear same-courtyard geography.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No confusing spatial cut, no fighting, no full monster inspectors.

prompts.prompt: Macro old well rim in dusk, thin Qingming incense touches stone edge, wet moss catches one narrow moon-white glint, black well interior unseen, suspenseful final image.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No full jade piece, no face, no hand, no bright magic beam.

prompts.prompt: Abrupt black screen after the well glint, no visible image, hold for final register snap sound, vertical short drama cliffhanger.
prompts.negative_prompt_notes: No extra reveal, no explanatory text, no jade or character silhouette.
